positive: Minimalist line art design of a geometric cityscape skyline at twilight, integrating stylized abstract natural elements like crescent moons and soaring mountain peaks. The composition must be highly graphic and bold, focusing on strong silhouettes and negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, soft lavender, and vibrant cyan for a modern, ethereal look. The print style should be suitable for screen printing on apparel, featuring clean, crisp lines and solid color blocks. Composition must center the main skyline graphic.
